text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an outing on our day off, I walk Rice Shower
back home.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I had fun today, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I had fun today, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heyyy! Is that you, Rice? Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep! H-Hishiama?! Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. Didn't mean to spook you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping you'd come lend a hand in the
kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Do you mean cooking?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, remember? Today's the day I treat
everyone in our dorm to some home cookin'.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I just bought a load of ingredients and could use
a hand!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um... But what if I make a mess?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, are you talkin' about what happened
last time?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's right, the kitchen was white as snow, wasn't
it? But that flour bag was already ripped, ya
know!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Stuff like that happens all the time! Besides, it
was more funny than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! You should make those croquettes
again. They were to die for!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'd love to try them again... How about it? Will ya help me out?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but... I'll just make a mess...
choice_data_list: I want to try your croquettes.
Just think of it as helping a friend.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Hehe, well, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make a bunch and bring you some another
day.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Another day? How about right now? I'm pretty
sure we have the ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
In that case... You should join us, Big Brother!
That way you can eat them fresh!
choice_data_list: Okay! And I'll help cook too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
In that case... You should join us, Big Sister! That
way you can eat them fresh!
choice_data_list: Okay! And I'll help cook too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, you two! You know trainers aren't
allowed in the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, that's right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get to try one of Rice Shower's croquettes a few
days later. They're just as delicious as I imagined.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I don't know if I can be of any help...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-okay... Hishiama, I might just get in the way,
but—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! Who cares if a bag or two of flour bursts!
As long as you're helpin'!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, Rice... You've got yourself a nice
trainer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Not that long ago, you would lock yourself up in
your room whenever anything bad happened.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was worried about whether you'd be able to
meet a proper trainer... heh.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did! Big Brother is really kind and reliable...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did! Big Sister is really kind and reliable...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ha, you're totally blushin'! Keep up the
compliments, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I can go on forever about Big Brother's
good qualities!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I can go on forever about Big Sister's
good qualities!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: He's a hard worker, smart, has a cute smile...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: She's a hard worker, smart, has a cute smile...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower keeps up the compliments for a while
after.
